review_body: These headphones are incredible. The active noise cancelling works perfectly on my daily commute and the battery life lasts for days. Highly recommend!
The sound is okay but the plastic headband cracked after only two weeks of light use. For this price I expected much better durability.
Makes a hot cup of coffee quickly. The programmable timer is a lifesaver in the mornings. Simple to clean as well.
It does the job but it is very loud and the water reservoir is smaller than advertised. It is just fine for a guest room.
The research put into this biography is astounding. It provides a fresh perspective on well-known events. Couldn't put it down.
I really wanted to like this book but the pacing is glacial. The author spends too much time on minor details that don't advance the plot.
I have sensitive skin and this moisturizer hasn't caused any breakouts. My face feels hydrated and soft all day long.
The product works okay but the scent is so strong and artificial that I can't stand to wear it. It smells like industrial cleaner.
Good grip and cushioning. However it did have a bit of a rubbery smell for the first few days that took a while to dissipate.
As soon as I start sweating I lose my grip on this mat. Not safe for hot yoga sessions at all.
Bought this for my 5-year-old and they haven't stopped playing with it. It seems sturdy enough to survive rough play.
The box arrived damaged and when we opened it two of the main structural pieces were missing. Very frustrating for a birthday gift.
The size chart was accurate and the fabric is much higher quality than I expected for the price. I will be ordering more colors.
Followed the washing instructions exactly but the shirt shrank two sizes and the color faded significantly. Waste of money.
You get what you pay for. It’s not a high-end tablet but for browsing the web and watching Netflix it works perfectly fine.
